name: Security Mentions
description: Advisory mod that flags whole-word security keywords (auth/token/secret/credential/oauth/webhook/cve/...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
advises_on: Whole-word security keywords (auth/token/secret/credential/oauth/webhook/cve/...) in title + body + evidence excerpts.
requirements: The neutral evidence stream (AdapterEmission) — no credentials, no live network.

ui.card_blurb: Surfaces security-keyword mentions; a routing signal, never a finding-of-record.
